reviews.title: Đến nơi thì kêu hết phòng
reviews.text: Đã book trên Agoda mà đến nơi kêu hết phòng, gọi dt số hotline ko thì kêu tới đi.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: No lounge or mini bar as advertised, it’s not on the beach, no shower curtains

reviews.title: Staff service bad
reviews.text: Morning u go to the breakfast, got staff is black face with u, and u no more mood to eat the breakfast!!! Service so bad!!!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Honestly, this was the worst place I’ve ever stayed in. First of all, there was no window in the room – and nobody mentioned that when I booked. When I complained, the staff didn’t even try to help, they just told me I could cancel. But it was high season and the whole city was fully booked, so I had no choice but to stay. It felt like being stuck in an aquarium – dark, stuffy, and really uncomfortable.
reviews.negatives: There was a window, but it just looked inside the hotel, not outside

reviews.title: Không ăn sáng như lúc giới thiệu trên agoda
reviews.text: Khi đặt khách sạn cí ghi rõ phục vụ ăn sáng miễn phí nhưng đến khi nhận phòng lại nói là Room Only. Tôi kiểm tra lại đơn xác nhận cũng không ghi cụm từ Room Only. Không biết là agoda hay khách sạn chịu trách nhiệm phần này. AE đặt phòng lưu ý hỏi kỹ lễ tân trước khi book nhé

reviews.title: Horrible. Don’t go there it’s not clean at all.
reviews.positives: Honestly nothing, left the next morning as the room was too disgusting, had a strong moisture smell that gave us headaches, stains everywhere and the shower had hairs already before using it. Pictures are a scam!
reviews.negatives: It seemed like the room had not been clean in a year. As a backpacker I am used to budget friendly accommodation but this was unacceptable. It felt like a scam because the grand hall when you arrive and the pictures looked good, but as soon as you go through the hotel floors it’s moisture and cigarette smell all over. Our room had no window and the worst smell, in addition to stains everywhere. We asked to see 2 other rooms in the morning and even the one considered “deluxe” was in the same condition. Staff was also nonchalant during our experience like they knew it’s shit! Just don’t bother to go there!!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Really bad wifi, facility is old, sound proof not good as I can hear everything from the aisle and outside, info on Agoda said that the hotel had parking for car but in fact didn't, the hotel is just so-so, for that amount of money definitely can book a better room

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Service and staffs were so bad. They canceled our booking but not notify. They told that they called us to make deposit before check in but we did not get any calls from them. Let’s image that, we are 4 people included in 2 old persons U70 arrived to check in hotel but they denied and no apologize for us and that time was 8pm after driving over 500km from Hoi An. Then, they gave us an option to move on another hotel but this ones were extremely bad and bad. The rooms were wet and no clean. We were so disappointed about this experience.

reviews.title: A hotel with good cost performance, but...
reviews.text: The hygiene condition is very poor. I brought a filter for the shower, but it turned black in just one day; it seems there are a lot of water stains. The first room I stayed in had cockroaches, and so I moved to another room that had a lot of ants, and I got bitten a lot at night. The view was mediocre, and I didn't think it would be a good place to stay for long, so I ended up getting a refund and moving to another accommodation. I usually don't write reviews, but this was not a good experience. The location is very good and the accessibility is excellent. The area near the hotel is lively with plenty of food and shopping options, which was very nice!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Big room and clean inside
reviews.negatives:
I was charged parking fee while it is included in booking advertise.
Security guard is not kind nor flexible.
The lobby on 4th floor was dirty.

reviews.title: DONT bother, aged dated and not value for money. Looks good in photos but not really what it’s madeb
reviews.positives: Didn’t oppt for breakfast
reviews.negatives:
Was given a balcony room with the view of another balcony wall opposite by 2 mtrs away,  the three large industrial aircon units floor,to,ceiling right beside my balcony door,  continually hummed all,night .
No hot water for showers in afternoon, said had mini bar. Was empty and turned off,  room service only comes after 2 or 3 pm on the 7 th floor  too many  smokers outside rooms and main entrance.

reviews.title: Very clean room, loud construction, unpleasant pool
reviews.text: Pretty great room!!! Good cleaning services and friendly check-in. The pool area was dirty, disorganized, full of smoke and very unpleasant to spend time in. The night (male) receptionists were much less friendly and helpful than the daytime women. The bathroom plug did not work. There was also LOUD CONSTRUCTION NOISE (hammering and drilling) from early in the morning on two out of the three nights I stayed. There was quieter construction noise in the morning on the second day, after I complained about it, which was more reasonable, but it seemed like they completely forgot about the issue one day later. The buffet and conference area floors were also very dirty and there was nowhere comfortable to sit. There were mosquitoes in the lobby (though the lobby was otherwise quite clean) so I could not sit with a laptop and work there either. It was a much better hotel than I was expecting, and I would come back, but there are multiple things they could improve.

reviews.title: NOT A GOOD CHOICE
reviews.positives: Hotel staff was friendckin,chey ly and very helpful  No issue with early checkin.
reviews.negatives:
The biggest problem is the infested mold on the glass window frame and its curtain in the bathroom.
Boring breakfast : few selections, no good quality, almost the same every day

reviews.title: Сырость подвала :(
reviews.text:
1) Мы бронировали номер с окном, по крайней мере при выборе номера фотки были с окнами. Окно, которое было в нашем номере, выходила в лестничный пыльный туннель. Из-за того, что нету окон, комната абсолютно не проветривается и пахнет сыростью подвала. Менять номер на ресепшене отказались

2) Фитнес зал это трэш. Там одна раздолбанная беговая дорожка, которая не работает и пару велосипедных дорог. Все в ужасном состоянии

3) Очень темно в номере

reviews.title: I left after 11 hours. Had booked for 3 nights
reviews.positives: Location was good
reviews.negatives:
My booking said walk in shower. There was a bath. 
They advertised power adapters and converters available but weren’t. 
I tried to pay for breakfast - good luck with that one. 
The rooms profess to be soundproof but it sounded like there was a party going on in every other room but mine. Doors slamming all day and night. 
The hotel booklet gives you all the information but unfortunately to a hotel with a different name (same name as was on all the linen), none which is current with this hotel. 
The room safe was locked, tried to get assistance - again, good luck with that one!
None of the staff speak any English. I understand that I’m in Vietnam but this can present a lot of challenges when problems arise.

reviews.title: Secret Room
reviews.text: When traveling for work, remember to choose a room with a window. To my surprise, the room I received had a skylight and was very damp with a smell of medication. Since I only stayed one night, I tried to sleep. In general, I won't return.

reviews.negatives: Just walk in the hotel is not clean as much the elevator is extremely dirty and the halls have lot of spot under construction. The trash can inside my room have a stained and the hotel is doesn’t do much.

reviews.title: BUDGET HOTEL IN THE CITY CENTER
reviews.text:
1 CHEAP HOTEL RIGHT IN THE CENTER OF NHA TRANG BEACH CITY.
ADVANTAGES: AFFORDABLE PRICE, I BOOKED FOR THE WEEKEND FOR 310, INCLUDING TAX. THE HOTEL IS RIGHT IN THE CENTER, LOCATED IN A LARGE ALLEY, CARS CAN ENTER AND EXIT EASILY. CARS CAN PARK IN FRONT OF THE HOTEL UP TO 3 VEHICLES. THERE'S A SMALL SWIMMING POOL LARGE ENOUGH FOR YOU TO SOAK IN THE WATER.
DISADVANTAGES: STAFF HANDLE SITUATIONS SLOWLY. PROBLEM-SOLVING TAKES A LITTLE LONG. THE ROOM WAS NOT VERY CLEAN; I WALKED AROUND THE ROOM WITHOUT SLIPPERS AND MY FEET GET VERY DIRTY, SO I DON'T FIND THE ROOM CLEAN AT ALL. IT'S A 4-STAR HOTEL BUT THE ROOM DOES NOT HAVE AN IRON. THE BREAKFAST WAS A BIT LIMITED, AND THE STAFF INITIALLY HAD A LITTLE ATTITUDE TOWARDS ME.
AND ONE THING I DIDN'T LIKE ABOUT THIS HOTEL IS THE LOBBY; THE RECEPTION DID NOT TURN ON THE AIR CONDITIONER, IT WAS SO HOT. WAITING TO RESOLVE ISSUES, WAITING TO GET MY ROOM WHILE STANDING IN SWEAT, WETTING MY SHIRT, NO AIR CONDITIONING OR FAN, GUESTS STANDING OR SITTING WAITING IN THE HEAT, IT'S UNCOMFORTABLE. I DON'T UNDERSTAND WHY THEY BUILT A BIG LOBBY FOR GUESTS BUT DIDN'T TURN ON THE AIR CONDITIONING; IF THEY ARE AFRAID OF HIGH ELECTRICITY BILLS, THEY SHOULD JUST CLOSE THE HOTEL.
reviews.response:
Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã để lại đánh giá. Ý kiến góp ý của Quý khách giúp đội ngũ nhân viên khách sạn nỗ lực hơn để mang lại chất lượng dịch vụ tốt nhất cho du khách.
Trân trọng.
BN Boutique Nha Trang

reviews.title: Good place with decent breakfast
reviews.text: Stayed in deluxe room which was around 20 usd per night. Room very good for Vietnam standards ( which are far lower than many other south east Asia countries) . Breakfast very good, buffet with very decent Chinese options, both hot and some fruits, though fruits very limited. Only serious downside is that there are not a single dairy product, no yoghurt, not even milk for coffee. This was very disappointing. Gym not usable as almost all hotels in Vietnam- go running at beach.

reviews.title: The hotel didn’t quite meet my expectations despite its high rating, with underwhelming facilities, a less-than-ideal lo
reviews.positives: We can check in an hour before the usual check-in time.
reviews.negatives:
I picked this hotel because it had a high rating, but it didn’t really live up to it:
- The facilities weren’t great — no water purifier in the lobby and no iron available.
- It’s not that close to the beach either; you have to cross two traffic lights to get there.
- Breakfast was pretty disappointing — not much variety, and they didn’t even have sandwiches.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Room was big and clean, close enough to the beach
reviews.negatives: I wanted to add to my previous review that they do NOT accept any card payment although it is writing the payment info section. I complained to them and to Booking.com about it. Also, they apparently were called Green Lighthouse before and a lot of their interior and accessories still have that old logo on them. That's a bit confusing.

reviews.title: Okay hotel
reviews.text: The hotel was fine but had many areas that could have been better. We  had a lot of ants in our room, on the 19th floor. The shower had no screen or curtain so would soak the bathroom any time it was used. The fridge didn't chill anything and had a very bright LED inside that lit up the room at night. The curtains didn't fully cover the windows.

reviews.positives: Staff
reviews.negatives: Ants in room

reviews.title: Not as expected.
reviews.text: Overall, everything is quite good. The room is well-equipped, the breakfast buffet is delicious, and the staff is quite enthusiastic. However, household appliances like the hair dryer and kettle are quite old and the hair dryer is broken. The rooftop seems to have discontinued services (there is no beverage counter and no staff), looking quite deserted and worn out. It was my first time on the rooftop at night to eat and use the restroom, and as I got close to the restroom, the lights suddenly turned on (even though the lights here are activated by a switch, not automatically). I was quite scared and left afterwards.

reviews.title: Unhappy
reviews.positives: The location is good
reviews.negatives: The staff try to cancel my room at the day I arrived. Most of facility such as gym, pool, rooftop bar is dirty and terrible.

reviews.title: Clean Rooms, Friendly staff, comfortable bed
reviews.text: Room was clean, but old aged. Staff very friendly except for the breakfast staff. The bed was above average. The breakfast was 6:30-930AM. At 9am most of the food was gone and staff made no attempt replace food and drinks. Before 9:30am, the hotel staff walked around guests and told guests breakfast was over with an non verbal X signal. This was the normal routine for 7 days.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Close enough to the beach. My King room was big and clean enough.
reviews.negatives: My room 707 had troubles with the AC, also the toilet bowl was leaking, and the room door didn't close easily (3 times I came back to the room and the door was wide-open). The main areas, especially hallways and lift, are not clean. The gym is very minimal. The pool has no nice environment to lie down and relax - also a lot of street noise. There was nobody the 3 times I went to the pool area, no staff, no guests. Breakfast costs extra and from what I saw, it is not great, so I would rather eat elsewhere.

reviews.title: going to Nha Trang with family
reviews.text: The room is a bit small, breakfast is barely acceptable, only good for being close to the beach, the price is not cheap, the room doesn't vent the smell from the toilet outside, by evening the foul smell from the toilet comes out, it's enough to make you want to vomit.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: The hotel staff’s attitude was very unprofessional. There was no friendliness or basic courtesy; instead, they appeared irritated and unwelcoming. This made me feel uncomfortable as a guest and significantly affected my overall experience.

reviews.title: Cheap and good
reviews.text: In my room, there is a small window near the bed, and since there are no curtains, I was bothered by the outside light coming in when I sleep. Also, the door locks but the door guard was broken and missing. After going out, the key stopped working, and the security staff helped me change the battery. Despite these troubles, the price was low, and the staff were very kind and responded quickly, so overall it was a great hotel with no problems at all.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: It is a good accommodation for a 0.5 night stay.
reviews.text: The small space has a humid atmosphere, so it's not recommended for long-term use, but the cleanliness of the facilities and the state of cleaning provide satisfaction for accommodations under 20,000 won. I checked in early at 1 PM and checked out at 11:30 AM to catch a 2:30 AM flight, so I would recommend it as just a half-night stay rather than an overnight stay.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The hotel is reasonably priced, but unfortunately the staff communication and attitude were disappointing.

reviews.title: 0.5 nights
reviews.text:
Instead of saying it's a 0.5-night stay, I would say that we checked out at 12 PM because Regal Gold does not allow lake check-out, and we had a flight at 12:40 AM, so we stayed until 9:30 AM.  
Pros: 1. First of all, the price is very cheap.  
           2. Free for children up to 11 years old?  
           3. Early check-in is allowed.  

Cons: 1. The lobby is relatively clean, but there is a bit of a smell in the hallway of the rooms (there are many Chinese and local people).  
           2. There is a bit of a moldy smell from the air conditioner.  
           3. You can hear the sound of showers from the neighboring room.  
           4. If you open the window, you can see other rooms across and to the left and right; I don't know if it's another hotel, but the windows are close together.  

I’ve summarized it like this. We dropped off our luggage, had lunch, went shopping, got a massage, had dinner, rested for a while, took a shower, and left. We booked for about 14,000 won, and I think the cost-performance ratio is quite good. However, if it were me, I wouldn't stay overnight with my child even for 0.5 nights. I think it would be perfect to drop off luggage, take a shower before heading to the airport, and then leave.
reviews.response:
친애하는 소중한 손님,
BN Boutique Nha Trang 서비스에 대해 좋은 리뷰를 남겨주셔서 감사합니다. 귀하의 리뷰는 저희 호텔 직원이 고객에게 최고의 서비스 품질을 제공하기 위해 더 열심히 노력하는 데 도움이 됩니다.
다음 번 숙박 시에도 귀하를 섬길 수 있는 기회가 있기를 바랍니다.
감사합니다.
BN Boutique Nha Trang

reviews.title: Cheap price, rooms have just enough amenities.
reviews.text:
- Super beautiful location, walking distance to the city center, 200m to the square & beach. Very convenient for watching the sunrise. Close to the dam market and night market, so it's easy to shop and eat.
- The room is a bit old but for the low price (~270k/night/double room) I find it acceptable for an overnight stay.
- The room is a bit noisy, seems like soundproofing is not effective.
- Suitable for trips where you don't stay in the hotel much, mainly going out to have fun.

reviews.negatives: Breakfast is the same every day. Same fruit etc. No variety, not even Jam or Honey to put on the Bread. Hard Beds. This place is geared more towards the Asian tourists.

reviews.title: The price is really reasonable..
reviews.text: The location is really nice. They did a great job cleaning and everything was good, but there were a lot of tiny red bugs like ants, which might be characteristic of Nha Trang. Even just bringing snacks and leaving them around would attract them immediately. The refrigerator wasn't cold enough, and there were many disappointing aspects, but the room was spacious, so it was comfortable.

reviews.title: worth the price.
reviews.positives: the location was great, fairly close to the beach and all the facilities (fruits shop, markets, restaurants). in comparison to other places I’ve stayed in, BN Hotel had a better breakfast selection. room and staff was ok, nothing really exceptional.
reviews.negatives: we did have a small balcony, but the view was right on the next hotel. but it’s fine for the price.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Overall, a decent stay at BN Hotel.

The staff were polite and helpful throughout the stay. The hotel maintains clear rules, one thing to note is that seafood is not allowed inside the room, so guests may need to plan meals outside.

Room lighting feels a bit on the romantic side, slightly dim if you prefer brighter lighting. However, the plus point is the room is relatively quiet with minimal traffic noise, making it comfortable for rest.
A reasonable choice for travelers looking for a calm stay with basic comfort.

reviews.text:
Stayed 14 days checked  in by Mrs. Huong in a professional and friendly manner.All her team were friendly and informative.
The hotel is a large complex in a lane way with nearby local eateries, laundry and shops.
The hotel is a bit dated but our room was quite good.The buffet has a large variety of foods which changes everyday.
The swimming pool step was missing un able to get in and out of the pool.After notifying Mrs.Huong it was rectified with in a couple days.
I would recommend BN hotel and would come back again

reviews.title: An ok hotel.
reviews.positives:
The hotel is on a somewhat quiet street and a good locations for many things, going to the beach, shopping, etc.  We had booked a room for 5 night but our flight was canceled so only stayed 4 nights.  The hotel was accommodating and we didn’t get charged for that night. (We had notified them earlier of a no show).
Our first night we were given a small, smelly room with no window, nothing like we had booked.  We were told there were no other rooms available.  Not true the place was almost empty.  The next day we were moved into a better room at my husband’s insistence.
The breakfast had an ok selection of food, vegetables, salads, and a congee.  All serve red cold.   When we asked why the food was cold the manager acted surprised but nothing changed.  We asked for just rice and I was given rice that was several days old and so hard I couldn’t eat it.  In this tropical county the only fruit they had was sliced watermelon each morning. We went out and crossed the road and bought papaya, breadfruit, bananas and mangoes. Why just melons?
The staff were kind, the room was clean, and everything worked.  10 years ago this might have been a 4-5 star hotel, but not today.

reviews.title: 0.5 night accommodation in a central location 👍
reviews.text:
I reserved a place for the last day at 0.5 accommodation, as it was an early morning flight. The price is super affordable, right in the middle of the city. The location is really great; it's a bit further inside from the road, right next to More Time Hotel. If you can't find it easily, you can just look for More Time. 

It's small but has a swimming pool, and the accommodation is spacious, although the soundproofing doesn't seem to be very good. I recommend it if you're looking for a hotel with good cost performance and a great location. If you don't mind not having a sea view, this hotel is nice because it's spacious and clean. I couldn't try the breakfast since I stayed for only 0.5 nights, but it's good as a budget hotel.

Other than that, I have no complaints, hehe. I will definitely come back here for my next trip. I've stayed in many hotels, but the price and quality here are very good.

reviews.text: I booked a 0.5 night stay since I had an early morning flight. As soon as I went out into the alley, it was easy to find places I had been wandering around, so I was able to grab a drink and have dinner comfortably. I mistakenly thought the alley was narrow based on reviews, but it was wide enough for cars to come and go. The entrance stairs were a bit daunting, but a staff member I happened to meet helped me carry my luggage. Since staff are not always present, that is something to keep in mind. The staff were friendly, and the room was clean. There was no separate shower booth, so I had to be a bit careful showering in the bathtub. I had a nice rest during my stay~

reviews.title: BN Boutique Hotel Nha Trang
reviews.text:
Absolutely loved my stay at BN Boutique Hotel. The location is spot on—tucked just a short walk from the beach and the Night Market, so it’s super easy to pop out for a swim, dinner, or a stroll along Tran Phu. Housekeeping was consistent and reception was friendly. Value for money is excellent here compared with other hotels.

Overall, BN Boutique Hotel delivers everything you need for its price. I’d happily return and recommend it to friends.

À notre arrivée tardive (4h du matin), on avait clairement l’impression de déranger le night qui faisait ça nuit sur un canapé, alors que nous avions réservé l’hôtel car la réception était ouverte 24/24. Le lendemain on fait une demande pour le nettoyage de chambre à la réception, la personne ne comprend pas, nous tourne le dos et nous ignore, étrange comme façon d’accueillir les clients. 

Au 21 eme étage, il est indiqué « lounge bar » : il est inexistant. 

L’eau de la douche pas toujours chaude.

reviews.title: The location is very good.
reviews.text:
It was a budget plan without a window or breakfast, but the room was spacious and clean. Although there was a busy main road nearby, the hotel was set back a bit from the side street, allowing for a very quiet stay at night. The neighborhood had convenience stores, restaurants, and massage shops, making it very convenient for anything you needed. Buying banh mi and coffee nearby and enjoying breakfast on a bench by the beach while looking at the sea created a feeling of extraordinary experience unique to traveling, making it a very memorable occasion. I only stayed one night this time, but I would like to try a longer stay next time.

As for the two bottles in the bathroom, I couldn't tell which was shampoo and which was shower gel, so I would appreciate labels or some way to distinguish them.

reviews.title: A good choice
reviews.text:
My family stayed at BN hotel for 3 nights. The hotel is designed to 4-star standards. Overall, I assess it as good. The hotel is a choice for many foreign and domestic guests. 
- The hotel is located in the central area, close to the beach (300m, it's not far to walk for a swim), near the night market (mainly for foreigners), and near the Scent Tower (a place to enjoy the breeze).
- Especially close to a delicious snail restaurant (250m), with prices consistent with Vietnam (40k per dish), and mostly foreign customers dining there.
- However, the hotel should also check the room equipment a little bit, considering installing a larger capacity toilet exhaust fan and equipping smart TVs.

reviews.negatives: L’heure limite pour le petit déjeuner est à 9h30, un peu trop tôt. PD en buffet mais essentiellement asiatique.

reviews.title: Never again !!!
reviews.positives:
Eigentlich nichts. Wir hatten zwei Nächte gebucht und sind nach einer weitergefahren. Wir reisen schon seit 2½ Monaten, da ist es uns wichtig, dass unsere Fitness aufrecht erhalten bleibt und suchen daher Unterkünfte mit Swimmingpool und Fitnessraum. Was wir hier vorgefunden hatten war eine Katastrophe. Auf keiner der Liegen am Pool hätte man sich legen können, sie waren alle kaputt. Im Fitnessraum funktionierte nichts, außerdem wurde hier im letzten Jahr wohl nicht mehr geputzt. Sämtliche Flure im Hotel, die wir gesehen hatten, erging es ähnlich. 
In unserem Badezimmer war die Klobrille nur noch an einer Halterung befestigt, es war nicht ungefährlich, es zu benutzen. 
Nein, wofür hier 4 Sterne vergeben werden, ist uns ein Rätsel.
reviews.negatives: Es hat uns wirklich nichts gefallen. Nach dem Verlust unserer Zimmerkarte mussten wir auch noch 8 US Dollar bezahlen.

reviews.title: Enttäuschung in fast allen Bereichen
reviews.positives: WiFi und A/C funktionieren gut. Betten recht bequem. Die Lage ist Zentral und keine 5 Minuten zu Fuß vom Strand entfernt.
reviews.negatives:
Die Anfragen ob early check in möglich sei wurde sowohl auf whatsapp als auch über Booking.com nicht beantwortet. Wie viele Reisende kamen wir morgens früh mit dem Nachtbus an, weshalb wir gerne früh eingecheckt hätten. Wir mussten dann aber 6 Stunden auf den check in warten da wir  nicht bereit waren einen Aufpreis von 50% des Zimmerpreises für den early check in zu zahlen. Das Zimmer war verfügbar, aber man ließ uns aus Prinzip warten. 50% für 6 Stunden früher ist nicht einmal rechnerisch fair. 25% wären vielleicht noch fair gewesen, da 1/4 Tag mehr. Auch als wir um 11 Uhr nochmal fragten weil wir müde und verschwitzt waren und ausruhen wollten, wurden wir hängen gelassen. Kein Service aus Prinzip. Klar hätten wir zahlen können, das war unsere Entscheidung, aber die Umstände waren unmöglich.
Das Zimmer war nicht gut gereinigt. Neben Staub und Dreck auf Boden und Flächen fanden wir Plastikmüll auf der Fensterbank sowie eine 2 Wochen alte Laundry-service Quittung.
Die Wannendusche hat keinen Spritzschutz, sodass man in einem Sternen-Hotel alles nass macht beim Duschen.
Der Kühlschrank und der restliche Strom funktionieren nur wenn die Zimmerkarte an der Tür den Strom aktiviert. Das macht den Kühlschrank völlig wertlos, da man nichts kaltes zu trinken bekommt wenn man in das Zimmer kommt.
Das Zimmer ist sehr hellhörig. Fahrstuhlgeräusche und Nachbarn sind immer zu hören, egal ob neben oder über einem.
Es wird mit einer Rooftop-Bar, einem Rooftop-Pool und einem Gym, ebenfalls im 21. Stock geworben. Im Pool kann man vor lauter Chemie die Augen nicht öffnen und natürlich ist er viel kleiner als auf den Fotos zu erwarten. Die Bar ist nicht besetzt. Getränke, Gläser oder sonstiges Equipment sind gar nicht vorhanden, geschweigedenn Personal. Die Toiletten dort oben bekommen kein Toilettenpapier, dafür aber Zigaretten in der Toilette.

Das Zimmer war für zwei Erwachsene und zwei Kinder 10 Jahren und 6 jahren recht klein.
Wenn man aus dem Fensrer schaute hatte man gleich die Wand vom Nachbar Hotel gesehen, dadurch war das Hotel recht dunkel.

reviews.title: Wir kommen nächsten Winter wieder, und bleiben paar Wochen im BN Boutique Hotel.
reviews.positives:
Ein ansprechendes, mittleres Hotel, gut gelegen - 5 Minuten zum Strand, alles fußläufig erreichbar, wir kamen gerade aus dem Norden und waren angenehm überrascht. Aus einer Woche wurden mit 3 x Verlängerung mehr als 5 Wochen. Das ist Aussage genug! Und wir beginnen unseren Winteraufenthalt 2026/27 wieder für längere Zeit im BN Boutique Hotel.
Frühstück war in Ordnung - alles da und auch für den europäischen Magen sehr gut genießbar, dazu ganz liebes Personal - immer am Wuseln um es dem Besucher so gastlich wie möglich zu machen. Ganz toll auch die Truppe im Speisesaal, immer wachsam und so nett! Also bereut haben wir unseren langen Aufenthalt im BN Boutique Hotel keinesfalls. Leider haben wir uns zu spät entschieden noch etwas länger zu bleiben und so war das BN Boutique dann ausgebucht. Wir zogen weiter... Ich lese manche Kommentare hier mit Unverständnis, wir sind nun mal nicht in Europa mit einem dekadenten Unverständnis von überstrapazierter Sauberkeit, von völlig unrealistischen Ansprüchen wenn man nur mal das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis nimmt. Also, ein Hotel um länger zu bleiben - wirklich! Und grüßt mir das nette Personal !!!
An attractive, mid-range hotel, well located – 5 minutes to the beach, everything within walking distance. We had just arrived from the north and were pleasantly surprised. What started as a week turned into more than five weeks with three extensions. That speaks for itself! And we'll be returning for our winter stay in 2026/27 for an extended period at the BN Boutique Hotel.
Breakfast was fine – everything was there and very palatable, even for European stomachs. The staff was incredibly friendly – ​​always bustling about to make guests feel as welcome as possible. The team in the dining room was also fantastic, always attentive and so kind! We certainly didn't regret our extended stay at the BN Boutique Hotel. Unfortunately, we decided too late to extend our stay, and the BN Boutique was fully booked. So we moved on...
reviews.negatives:
Am Pool auf dem Dach gab eine Diele im Poolbereich nach, ich brach ein und verletzte mich doch erheblich am linken Bein, 2 große Schürfwunden und eine erhebliche Fleichwunde am Knie. Ich mußte Hilfe in Anspruch nehmen, das Management hatte Kenntnis von dem Unfall, schrieb auch meine Zimmernummer auf als ich das Bein an der Rezeption erstversorgen ließ. So weit so gut und hat sich nie wieder gekümmert, weder gefragt wie geht es -  noch wie man das regeln könnte. Da habe ich eigentlich etwas mehr erwartet, wird mich aber nicht abhalten im Dezember wieder hierher zu kommen, ich werde nur ein wenig achtsamer sein im Poolbereich. (Der Fußboden wurde zeitnah ausgebessert und auch eine neue Bodenbeplankung eingebracht.) Trotzdem bleibt meine Bewertung fair, siehe oben, weil alles andere fraglos gut im BN Boutique Hotel war.
A plank in the pool area on the roof gave way, I fell through, and seriously injured my left leg – two large abrasions and a significant laceration on my knee. I had to seek help, and management was aware of the accident and even noted my room number when I had my leg treated at reception. So far, so good, but they never bothered to follow up, neither asking how I was nor suggesting how the situation could be resolved. I actually expected a bit more, but it won't stop me from coming back in December; I'll just be a little more careful in the pool area. (The floor was repaired promptly, and new flooring was installed.) Nevertheless, my rating remains fair, as mentioned above, because everything else at the BN Boutique Hotel was undoubtedly good.

reviews.title: Per trascorrere una o due notti va bene ma non aspettatevi niente di più che un letto.
reviews.positives: Buona posizione centrale in una zona vicinissima al lungomare e a ristoranti, bar, SPA e negozi. Prezzo ottimo anche se non giustifica la poca pulizia.
reviews.negatives:
La struttura non è molto pulita e curata in generale. Pulizia sommaria della camera, da evitare di guardare sotto il letto. Tracce di muffa in alcuni punti del bagno (lavandino). Poltrone con il tessuto macchiato. Parti comuni come i corridoi molto trascurate. Palestra minuscola con attrezzo rotto, la piscina sembrava sporca perciò non l’ho utilizzata. Personale non cortese come in altri posti che abbiamo frequentato. 
Diciamo che dalle fotografie sembrava un’altra cosa. La colazione non ha praticamente opzioni che assecondano il gusto europeo, per accompagnare il pane c’era il burro ma non c’era neppure una marmellata. Noi abbiamo soggiornato due notti, la seconda colazione l’abbiamo fatta fuori…c’è una pasticceria meravigliosa con soli 4 tavolini, sulla strada principale in direzione del mare mantenendo il lato destro della strada (credo si chiami Lucky) con brioche dolci e salate da non perdere.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Khách sạn làm ăn không uy tín va thiếu trách nhiệm. Minh đặt phong loại sang cho hai ngày. Ngày đầu tiên đến thì tiếp Tân bảo hết phòng loại sang va đưa cho mình phòng tiêu chuan. Rồi nói ngày mai sẽ đổi lại phòng loại sang cho mình. Đến hôm sao thi bảo giờ hết phòng loại sang,  con phong giường đôi  noi chung La ho co nhiều cách để nói va không giao đung phòng nhu minh đặt. Ho không hoàn tra tiền khi minh đặt loại sang va lai giao phong tiêu chuan. Nhan vien tiếp Tân một bạn nữ lại co thái độ cải lại với mình va cô ta con nói do mình đặt trên app Agora nen ho không có xu ly trường hợp này. Cô ta con nói Agora xu ly vi Agora nhận tiền của minh chứ khách sạn không nhận tiền nên ho không trả lại . An nói chuyện ngang ngược treo đầu dê bán thịt chó hay sao đó. Khách sạn lớn ma lam an không uy tín thêm cô tiếp Tân lại co thái độ với khách hàng. Moi người cần cẩn thận khi đặt khách sạn này trên app Agoda nha. Có trường hợp gi la ho không giải quyết cho minh đâu mà du khách sạn vẫn lấy tiền của minh những lại đổ hết cho Agora.
reviews.response:
Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã để lại đánh giá. Ý kiến góp ý của Quý khách giúp đội ngũ nhân viên khách sạn nỗ lực hơn để mang lại chất lượng dịch vụ tốt nhất cho du khách.
Trân trọng.
BN Boutique Nha Trang

reviews.title: Khách sạn 4 sao nhưng mọi thứ đều quá tệ
reviews.text: Điểm ấn tượng đầu tiên của mình là thái độ của nhân viên, mặt mũi cau có, khó chịu, thái độ không niềm nở, thiếu chuyên nghiệp. Khi check-in xong ra thang máy lên phòng mình ở tầng 11, vừa mở cửa thang máy ra đã thấy trên hành lang chất đầy đồ bẩn như ga giường, chăn gối nằm la liệt, nhìn rất mất mỹ quan, còn làm mình cảm thấy thiếu vệ sinh vô cùng. Vào phòng thì sàn nhà vẫn còn bụi bẩn, lên giường nghỉ ngơi xíu thì 1 mùi hôi khó chịu từ ga giường hay đệm và mùi chăn gối xộc lên mũi, mình không tiện nói ra đấy là mùi gì nhưng chắc cặp đôi nào cũng hiểu được. Chưa hết, thùng rác nhà vệ sinh còn bị oxy hóa nặng, nhìn không thể có chút thiện cảm nào, trong phòng thì thiếu đủ thứ đồ dùng thiết yếu khác. Thật sự không xứng đáng là khách sạn 4 sao một xíu nào, hôm trước mình đi Đà Lạt book đc khách sạn 3 sao thôi, với cùng giá tiền đó mà ổn hơn rất nhiều. Các bạn nên cân nhắc kỹ trước khi đặt phòng ở khách sạn này!

reviews.title: ニャチャンで最高のロングステイ
reviews.positives:
スタッフの心が最高のホテル。
合計で80泊したけど、本当に気持ちのいい滞在ができました。
レセプションスタッフのAŃHとHÚÓNGやマネージャーをはじめ、レストランスタッフ、掃除のお母さん、ハウスキーパーのお姉さんたち、セキュリティや保全スタッフのみなさん、全員が素敵な心の持ち主。まるでみんな家族のようなリラックスできる滞在でした。
レストランの朝食も毎日、日替わりでヌードルが変わるので飽きずに楽しめたし、卵料理をオーダーしてから焼いてくれるのもいい。
21階の屋上プールもほとんど水が濁る日もなく、ニャチャンの太陽で日焼けを満喫できた。最近、パラソルも設置されたので強すぎる太陽を避けてビールを楽しむこともできた。
素敵なホスピタリティをありがとう！ボクはまた戻ってくるよ！
reviews.negatives:
室内のWi-Fiが弱いのだけが困った。
部屋の遮音性が良すぎる反面、廊下に設置してあるWi-Fiのシグナルが室内では弱い。ボクはデジタルノマドだからネット環境は重要で、いつもドアを開けっぱなしにしてPCワークをするか、廊下にミニテーブルを移動して廊下で仕事する必要があった。屋上テラスのテーブルでもPCワークできたけど、4月からは暑いのと蚊がいたので、いつも廊下でPCワークしていた。
室内のWi-Fiが強ければこのホテルはコスパを考えると満点です。

reviews.title: Lễ tân và Sales của KS quá tệ
reviews.text:
Chưa thấy một KS nào có nhân viên sales và lễ tân tệ như KS này. Nhân viên sales nhắn qua Agoda bắt đặc cọc. Đặt cọc xong xuôi, chụp hình gửi xong qua Agoda thì lại bắt phải gửi tin qua Zalo cho Lễ tân. Gửi tiếp lễ tân và báo giờ check-in thì lễ tân nhắn lại không được thân thiện. Lúc đến thì nhân viên lễ tân rất lạnh lùng, vô cảm và coi như chưa có thông tin gì, thái độ rất thiếu chuyên nghiệp, thậm chí vô lễ! 
Sẽ tuyệt đối KHÔNG trở lại KS này!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Khách sạn đẹp, bảo vệ nhiệt tình
reviews.negatives: Vào ngày 17/7 mình có liên hệ khách sạn muống nhận phòng sớm, khách sạn báo là 14h mới được nhận phòng. Có nghĩa khách sạn đã thấy được đơn đặt phòng của mình. Và đã có mã đặt và mã pin vẳng hôi. Thế là trưa 14h mình đến thì bên khách sạn kêu đưa mã đặt phòng và mã pin. Sau khi cung cấp mã, bên khách sạn kiểm tra báo phòng mình đặt đã tự động hủy trong khi trên ứng dụng điện thoại mình vẫn bình thường. Mình nhờ khách sạn kiểm tra giúp nhưng họ nói xin lỗi do đơn đặt của mình bị tự động hủy giờ ko có cách nào, mong mình thông cảm. Mình không biết làm sao vì cuối tuần rất khó tìm phòng nên mình đã liên hệ tổng đài booking.com nhờ trợ giúp. Họ báo sẽ làm việc với khách sạn xem sao. Sau đó khách sạn báo tìm cho mình 1 khách sạn 3 sao, mới đầu mình cũng do dự, nhưng nếu không chịu thì giờ đi đâu. Tuy nhiên từ đặt 4 sao mà giờ phải ở phòng chất lượng thấp hơn thì đây là 1 trải nghiệm không tốt đối với mình. Mình mong rằng booking.com sẽ tìm ra nguyên nhân để khách hàng tránh có trải nghiệm không tốt như vậy ah.
